meaning: n.海浪,拍岸浪vi.作冲浪运动vt.在激浪上驾(船),在...冲浪
examples: I'm going to buy a surfboard and learn to surf.
No one knows how many people currently surf the Net.
During the rest of the year, Oahu enjoys the most notorious surf in the world.
Mr Craske warned that surf schools would be "trying to find space in the water".
